stemHtml: Which statement is correct concerning the effect of the application of carburettor heat?

options.a: The density of the air entering the carburettor is reduced, which enriches the fuel/air mixture.
options.b: The volume of the air entering the carburettor is reduced, which enriches the fuel/air mixture.
options.c: The density of the air entering the carburettor is reduced, which leans the fuel/air mixture.
options.d: The volume of the air entering the carburettor is reduced, which leans the fuel/air mixture.
